response.step_by_step_log: 1. Analyzed video and identified song 'Kanseitou yori' performed by Hakuiri Koyori. 2. Identified segment 00:00-01:50 as a live performance of the song and 01:58-02:44 as an animated music video for it. 3. Used search tool to confirm lyrics and song metadata. 4. Created JSON structure.
response.global_summary: The video features a live concert performance of the song 'Kanseitou yori' by Hakuiri Koyori (00:00-01:50), followed by an animated music video of the same song (01:58-02:44), and ending with announcements (02:45-04:59).

scenes.description: Hakuiri Koyori performs the song 'Kanseitou yori' in a 3D concert setting.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
ぽつり灯り 管制塔 砂嵐の向こうへ
祈るように綴った これからのこと
ラジオネーム 匿名希望 お便り 届いていますか
この世界がいつからか まるで他人事のように
やけに静かなので 不安になったのです
思い出したのです 人知れず口を噤んだまま
終われないのです それは嫌なのです
夢ってもっと わがままだったでしょう
応えてよ、笑ってよ、気付いてよ
此処に居るのにな、意地悪だな
誰にも届かない光を
どうしたら、伝えられるのでしょう
どうしても、伝えたいよ
ラジオネーム 匿名希望
ラジオネーム 匿名希望 意気地無しなのでしょうか
それともこの世界には ぼくはお邪魔でしょうか
だとしても綴るよ みっともなく叫ぶよ
フラれたって好きだよ いいでしょ いいでしょ
楽しかったよね 悔しかったよね
もう独り言は、嫌だ
「待たせちゃったかな」「別に待ってないよ」
夢と呼んだそれもぼくだっただけ
もういいかい
応えてよ、笑ってよ、気付いてよ
此処に居るのにな、意地悪だな
誰にも届かない光を
ぼくだけは
光と呼び続ける
真夜中 管制塔から あなたを明かしてやる
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Faint light, control tower, towards the other side of the sandstorm,
I wrote it as if praying, about what's to come.
Radio name, Anonymous. Are you receiving my letters?
Since when did this world become like someone else's affair?
It's so quiet, I became anxious.
I remembered, remaining silent without telling anyone.
I can't end it. I don't want that.
Dreams were supposed to be more selfish, right?
Answer me, laugh for me, notice me.
I'm right here, you're mean.
How can I convey this light that reaches no one?
I want to convey it, no matter what.
Radio name, Anonymous.
Radio name, Anonymous.
Am I a coward? Or am I a nuisance to this world?
Even so, I will write. I will shout unseemly.
Even if I get dumped, I like you. That's fine, right?
It was fun, right? It was frustrating, right?
I don't want to talk to myself anymore.
"Did I keep you waiting?" "I wasn't waiting at all."
It was just me who called it a dream. Is it okay now?
Answer me, laugh for me, notice me.
I'm right here, you're mean.
I alone will continue to call this light.
From the control tower in the middle of the night,
I will illuminate you.

scenes.description: Transition screen featuring the text '特報' (Special Announcement).
An animated music video for the song 'Kanseitou yori'.
